## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Manual checks completed for affected flow
- [ ] No secrets included
- [ ] Relevant docs updated

## Related Issue

Link related issue(s), if any.

## Screenshots or API Examples

Include screenshots or request/response examples when useful.
